subject: Son Gohan in a combat-ready pose, gritting teeth with fists raised
description: A young humanoid male figure crouches in an aggressive combat stance, body coiled with tension, fists up. The figure has dark hair and wears a purple gi-style outfit. The face shows clenched teeth and a fierce expression. Behind the figure, green and yellow energy crackles in an intense burst radiating outward. The overall palette is warm with green-gold energy dominating the background. The composition is a mid-shot tight to the upper body, emphasizing the intense facial expression and physical tension.
foreground: young male humanoid with dark hair in purple gi, crouched combat pose, teeth clenched, fists raised
background: green and gold energy crackling outward in burst pattern
